query:
SET @lesson1_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 1 LIMIT 1);

INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, type, correctAnswer) VALUES
(@lesson1_id, 'How many books are in the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'A'),
(@lesson1_id, 'Which of the following is NOT one of the four main sections of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'B'),
(@lesson1_id, 'Over what time period was the Old Testament primarily written?', 'multiple_choice', 'C'),
(@lesson1_id, 'What is the central theme of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'D'),
(@lesson1_id, 'In what language was the Old Testament primarily composed?', 'multiple_choice', 'A'),
(@lesson1_id, 'Which book begins the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'B'),
(@lesson1_id, 'What does the Old Testament provide for understanding the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'C'),
(@lesson1_id, 'Which of the following is a major theme of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'D'),
(@lesson1_id, 'How many books are in the Prophetic Books section?', 'multiple_choice', 'A'),
(@lesson1_id, 'What does the Old Testament chronicle?', 'multiple_choice', 'B'),
(@lesson1_id, 'Explain how the Old Testament serves as a foundation for Christian faith and theology.', 'short_answer', '');
